arts.sum: Chelsea have been linked with Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel. The Blues will make an offer for the forward should Bayern give Chelsea any sort of encouragement that the teenager is available this month.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Bournemouth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host Bournemouth in the Premier League on Tuesday as both teams continue the chase for European football. After four games without a win in the Premier League, Chelsea bounced back to thrash fourth-tier Morecambe in the FA Cup at the weekend. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals Christopher Nkunku transfer truth as Chelsea chase Mathys Tel signing
arts.sum: Reports earlier this month claimed Nkunku informed the Blues of his desire to leave, with former club Paris Saint-Germain said to be interested in the attacker, because he was not featuring as regularly as he would like. Enzo Maresca has revealed there has been no conversation between him and Christopher Nkunku over the Frenchman's future at Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca's five telling Chelsea transfer decisions amid Christopher Nkunku Bournemouth snub
arts.sum: Maresca heavily rotated his team for the cup tie and there is a big expectation that the Italian will make more changes this evening as the Blues return to Premier League action. Chelsea are looking to end their poor patch of form in the Premier League this evening as they welcome Bournemouth to Stamford Bridge.
